meta.meta_description: Send us your property enquiry and get guidance tailored to your situation.

hero.title: How can we help you?
hero.description: Whether you're buying, selling, moving home or simply looking for information, send us your enquiry and we'll point you in the right direction.

trust_items.title: Impartial & Independent
trust_items.subtitle: We provide unbiased information to help you decide better

trust_items.title: Reliable Information
trust_items.subtitle: Practical, up-to-date and easy to understand

trust_items.title: Response Within 24-48 Hours
trust_items.subtitle: We aim to respond to all enquiries within 1–2 working days

form.heading: Send us your enquiry
form.description: Tell us about your situation and we'll get back to you with the right guidance.

enquiry_types.label: New to the UK Property System

whatsapp.heading: Prefer WhatsApp?
whatsapp.note: This is the quickest way to reach us. We aim to respond within 24 hours.

email.heading: Prefer Email?
email.note: Send us an email and we'll get back to you within 1–2 working days.

process_steps.title: Send your enquiry
process_steps.description: Fill out a short form or choose an expert.

process_steps.title: We review your situation
process_steps.description: Our team reviews your enquiry and understands your requirements.

process_steps.title: We provide guidance
process_steps.description: We send you helpful guidance or connect you with the right professional.

resources.heading: While you wait, explore popular resources

items.title: Selling Guides
items.desc: Everything you need to sell your home

items.title: Regulations
items.desc: Stay informed about UK property rules
